summary: Frontend-only testing of LensaData landing page. All major sections render correctly. Language toggle, animations, contact links, and mobile responsive layout all working.
critical_code_review_comments: Nav links are implemented as <button> elements with onClick scroll handlers (not <a href> anchor tags). This is fine functionally but may affect SEO. Minor issue - no action needed unless SEO is a priority.

Scroll story 'Integration' stage label text is present in DOM (confirmed via inner_text) - initial test false negative due to case sensitivity. All 4 stages (CHAOS, INTEGRATION, INTELLIGENCE, DECISION) are present.
Case studies show 5 cards (confirmed by 5 'View Details' links) - initial count was misleading due to selector mismatch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All sections tested and working: Navbar (logo, nav buttons, EN/ID toggle, Get Started), Hero (headline, CTA buttons, DataSphere canvas, KPI floating cards), Scroll Story (4 stages: CHAOS/INTEGRATION/INTELLIGENCE/DECISION), Trust Metrics, Services (7 cards), Case Studies (5 cards), Founder (Yudanta + Zainuddin), Contact (WhatsApp wa.me/6285117577707, Email, Booking), FAB, Footer (PT FINXINA LINTAS BENUA). Language toggle EN<->ID works. Mobile hamburger menu visible at 390px width.

test_results.trust_metrics: PASS - Section renders with animated counters
test_results.services: PASS - 7 service cards (BI, Data Engineering, AI Workflow, Dashboard Dev, Market Intel, Automation, Enterprise Analytics)
test_results.case_studies: PASS - 5 case study cards present (Nationwide Sales Dashboard, Enterprise Power BI Dashboard, AI Chat Assistant, Market Intelligence System, Automation Engine)
test_results.founder: PASS - Yudanta Adhipramana and Zainuddin Fanani present with achievements
test_results.contact: PASS - WhatsApp (wa.me/6285117577707), Email (lensadata.id@gmail.com), Booking (s.id/konsultasi-data) all correct
